positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a friendly cosmic raccoon peering through a telescope at a starry galaxy, surrounded by floating crescent moons, nebula dust rendered as gradients of lavender and sapphire, and stylized constellation lines. The style is detailed, vintage scientific diagram meets contemporary whimsical cartoon, with clean linework, flat color blocking, and a bold, high-contrast palette. Centered composition, perfect for a t-shirt print. Rule of thirds applied to the galaxy arc. Studio lighting, clean white background with soft drop shadow for pop. Vector art, kawaii aesthetic, highly detailed, ink drawing style.
negative: low resolution, blurred, noise, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, photorealism, ugly, grain, jpeg artifacts, scary, dirty
